notes.player: At the start of the Cryptothrall's turn, it regains 2 Wounds. It is immune to the Bleeding, Fatigued, Frightened, and Poisoned Conditions. Additionally, it has no soul and cannot be detected by abilities such as Soulsight.

macro.author: MiguelWanderer

notes.gm: When the Cryptothrall becomes Desperate, it teleports itself back to the nearest tomb world. It also attempts to do this when it is about to Die. The Cryptothrall only counts as being Defeated if it uses Phase Out or dies without using it.

notes.player: When the Cryptothrall would die or be rendered Unconscious, roll 1d10. On a 7 or higher, it does not die or become Unconscious and gains wounds equal to the result.

macro.author: MiguelWanderer
